evals.prompt: We want to show user names and avatars in comments, cursors, and avatar stacks. How do we add user information so users aren't anonymous?
assertions: The response mentions setting name and avatar

evals.prompt: We want AI to collaborate like a human in our Liveblocks app — editing content and taking actions. How do we set up AI as a collaborator?
evals.expected_output: Recommend ai-as-a-collaborator. Explain agentic workflows so AI can collaborate inside the app.
assertions: The response mentions the agentic workflows documentation page

evals.prompt: We need an AI chat with RAG, tool calling, and custom UI components in our app. Not the workflow-based collaborator — the chat/copilot kind. How do we set this up with Liveblocks?
evals.expected_output: Recommend ai-chats-with-tools-knowledge-components. Explain Liveblocks AI Copilots: AiChat, RAG, knowledge, tools, custom components.
assertions: The response distinguishes from or does not confuse with workflow-based AI collaborator

evals.prompt: how do I pass custom headers to my Liveblocks auth endpoint?
assertions: The response mentions using a callback for authEndpoint in LiveblocksProvider
The response shows custom headers used in a fetch request

evals.prompt: how do I auth with access tokens
assertions: The response indicates this is simpler than or an alternative to ID tokens

evals.prompt: We need complex permissions per room and user. What's the recommended way to authenticate with Liveblocks?
Our rooms are hitting the user limit. How can we avoid filling up with inactive users?
assertions: The response mentions backgroundKeepAliveTimeout on LiveblocksProvider
The response mentions user limit or room capacity

evals.prompt: how do i set up multiple workspaces in my liveblocks app
assertions: The response mentions how rooms and notifications are compartmentalized (or similar phrasing)

evals.prompt: We need a fully custom comment composer that doesn't use the default one. How do we build our own with Liveblocks?
We're building a Figma-like or custom multiplayer canvas with conflict-free state. How do we use Liveblocks for custom realtime multiplayer beyond text editors?
evals.expected_output: Recommend create-custom-realtime-multiplayer. Explain Liveblocks Storage with LiveList, LiveMap, LiveObject for custom multiplayer apps.
assertions: The response mentions Liveblocks Storage or LiveList/LiveMap/LiveObject
The response mentions custom multiplayer or sync engine

evals.prompt: We want a custom toolbar for our Lexical editor that matches our design — static or floating. How do we do this with Liveblocks?
assertions: The response mentions Toolbar or FloatingToolbar

evals.prompt: Should we create Liveblocks rooms manually in production or let them be created on first connection?
assertions: The response recommends creating rooms yourself in production

evals.prompt: We want to customize how comments look inside threads — avatars, author, body. Can we use slots or override parts of the Thread component?
assertions: The response mentions customizing Thread or comment components with slots
The response mentions components or slots for avatar, author, or comment body

evals.prompt: Our app supports dark mode. How do we get dark mode styles for Liveblocks UI components?
evals.expected_output: Recommend dark-mode-styles. Explain importing @liveblocks/react-ui styles and dark theme (media-query or attributes).
assertions: The response mentions importing Liveblocks dark mode CSS

evals.prompt: We want to develop and run E2E tests without hitting Liveblocks production. How do we develop and test locally?
assertions: The response mentions the Liveblocks dev server
The response mentions E2E testing, perhaps with a tool like Playwright

evals.prompt: How can we inspect Liveblocks Storage, Yjs state, presence, and connected users in the browser?
assertions: The response mentions inspecting Storage, presence, or connected users

evals.prompt: We need to change button labels and tooltips in Liveblocks components (e.g. 'Reply' to 'Comment') and support other languages. How?
assertions: The response mentions overriding strings or locale for Liveblocks components
The response mentions LiveblocksUiConfig or separate component overrides

evals.prompt: Users sometimes can't join the room, how do we handle these connection errors in Liveblocks?
assertions: The response mentions ROOM_CONNECTION_ERROR or error codes (e.g. 4001, 4005, 4006)

evals.prompt: What do we do when a user tries to join a Liveblocks room that's already full?
evals.expected_output: Recommend useErrorListener and checking for code 4005
assertions: The response mentions handling full rooms

evals.prompt: useCreateThread sometimes throws. How do we catch and handle these errors?
Users with poor network see disconnections. How do we show fallbacks and messages when the Liveblocks connection is lost or restored?
assertions: The response mentions lost, restored, or failed connection states
The response mentions showing some sort of UI when it happens, e.g. toast, warning message, banner

evals.prompt: We have an SPA and need to log the user out of Liveblocks and reauthenticate without a full page refresh. How?
assertions: The response mentions reauthenticating without refresh

evals.prompt: We need several Tiptap editors on the same page, each synced with Liveblocks. How do we do this?
assertions: The response mentions the field prop
The response mentions Tiptap with Liveblocks

evals.prompt: We want the BlockNote text editor to load instantly from cache, without a loading spinner. How do we enable offline support?
We want to style Liveblocks default components (comments, buttons) to match our app. Can we override colors and spacing?
assertions: The response mentions overriding styles (e.g. accent, spacing, radius)

evals.prompt: Presence and useOthers are updating too often and our cursor/avatar components re-render constantly. How do we make presence updates more performant?
assertions: The response mentions (useOthersMapped and shallow) OR (useOther and useOtherConnectionIds)

evals.prompt: useStorage is causing too many re-renders when any part of storage changes. How do we make storage reads more performant?
assertions: The response mentions useStorage with selector functions

evals.prompt: Users sometimes close the tab before Liveblocks has synced their changes. How do we warn them and prevent losing unsaved data?
assertions: The response mentions preventUnsavedChanges on LiveblocksProvider
The response describes what it prevents

evals.prompt: We want to build our own comment UI using our design system but still need comment body, mentions, links. Can we use low-level pieces from Liveblocks?
assertions: The response mentions Comment.Body or other primitives
The response mentions where they are exported from (e.g. @liveblocks/react-ui/primitives)

evals.prompt: How do we remove or hide the 'Powered by Liveblocks' badge from our app?
assertions: The response mentions removing the Liveblocks branding or badge

evals.prompt: We use Liveblocks suspense hooks. How do we show error fallbacks when a hook throws (e.g. room failed to load)?
assertions: The response mentions ErrorBoundary for error fallbacks
The response mentions suspense hooks or handling hook errors

evals.prompt: We use Liveblocks suspense hooks. How do we show loading spinners or skeletons while the room is connecting?
assertions: The response mentions ClientSideSuspense for loading fallbacks
The response mentions suspense hooks or loading state

evals.prompt: We want to email users when they're mentioned in a comment or have unread thread activity. How do we send comment notification emails with Liveblocks?
Presence and storage updates feel choppy. Can we make Liveblocks updates smoother (higher frame rate)?
assertions: The response mentions throttle on LiveblocksProvider
The response mentions 60fps or smoother updates

evals.prompt: What's the difference between importing from @liveblocks/react and @liveblocks/react/suspense? When do we use ClientSideSuspense and when do we use isLoading?
evals.expected_output: Provide info on suspense vs regular hooks
assertions: The response explains the difference between /suspense and regular hooks

evals.prompt: We're using Tiptap with Liveblocks. What do we need for SSR, initial content, unsaved changes, and required extensions?
assertions: The response mentions StarterKit or Doc/Paragraph for Tiptap
The response mentions at least one of: SSR, initial content, unsaved changes, Liveblocks

evals.prompt: We want to send a notification to a user's Liveblocks inbox for something that isn't a comment — e.g. someone uploaded a file. How do we trigger custom notifications?
assertions: The response mentions custom kind (e.g. $ prefix)
The response mentions activities or ActivityData

evals.prompt: How do we get TypeScript types for Liveblocks presence, storage, user info, and room metadata across our app?
assertions: The response mentions Presence, Storage, UserMeta or global types

evals.prompt: Our app has one document per URL (e.g. /doc/abc123). How should we set the Liveblocks room ID — use the document ID from the URL?
assertions: The response recommends using URL params as room ID
The response mentions document or room ID from URL

evals.prompt: We need a relative timestamp ('5 minutes ago') and an emoji picker in our Liveblocks UI. Does Liveblocks provide these?
assertions: The response mentions Timestamp, Duration, EmojiPicker or utility components
The response mentions @liveblocks/react-ui primitives or utilities

evals.prompt: We're using Yjs with Liveblocks (not Tiptap/BlockNote/Lexical). What are best practices?
Tooltips and dropdowns from Liveblocks components are rendering behind our app's modals. How do we fix z-index issues with portaled elements?
